/usr/bin/ar qc librtx_remix_enhancements.a CMakeFiles/rtx_remix_enhancements.dir/src/core/kuonirad_hpc_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtx_remix_enhancements.dir/src/core/kuonirad_hpc_pipeline_options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtx_remix_enhancements.dir/src/core/ai_inference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtx_remix_enhancements.dir/src/pde/pde_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtx_remix_enhancements.dir/src/raytracing/wavefront_kernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rtx_remix_enhancements.dir/src/omniverse/usd_integration.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librtx_remix_enhancements.a
